title: cymbachne guineensis var. bisquamulata
intro: Cymbachne guineensis var. bisquamulata, also known as Cymbachne bisquamulata, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The leaves are said to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
